PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Continued To Jan-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Bugatto appeared by telephone for Mary Mana.

The Court stated that clarifcation of titles on the various properties was needed and directed Mr. Bugatto to obtain the deeds for each of the properties. The matter was continued to January 12, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Bugatto to provide a supplement and the deeds for the Examiner to review showing interest and verification of the properties.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Continued To Dec-08-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Bugatto for Mary Ann Mana (Petitioner).

Mr. Bugatto stated that he had no luck obtaining copies of the property deeds as the Examiner requested, that the property Manager could not find them, that he would have to open escrow in order to obtain the copies, that he filed a declaration from the property Manager and that he hoped that was sufficient. The Court stated that the deeds were needed, that there was a difference between the percentage interests in the petition and the percantage interests in the declaration and granted the petition as to the personal property only, not the real property (signing the modified order for the same in open court). Mr. Bugatto stated that the Decedent owned 3,984 shares in the Tock Corp. The matter was continued to December 8, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the remaining real property issue.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
